name: Sharpen the Blade
stimulus: Race-specific sharpening. Shorter, faster reps. Hill sprints in warmup for neuromuscular activation. Taper week 3. A-race 5K at the end.
goals: Mental sharpness — know the race plan cold

planned.desc:
Easy run 8km + 6x strides
Final speed block. Legs should feel FAST.
planned.notes: No strength today. Fresh for track tomorrow.

planned.desc:
TRACK — race simulation
WU: 2km easy + drills + 4x hill sprint (10sec max up any incline)
MAIN: 3km time trial @ 3:28-3:32
Full recovery 5min
+ 3x400m @ 76-78sec / 3:10-3:15/km (90sec jog)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Hill sprints in warmup fire up the nervous system. Then the 3km is your dress rehearsal. Race it. Fast 400s to practice closing speed.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 7km
PM: Strength 35min — maintenance
Lighter loads, explosive movements
Jump squats 3x4, single-leg hops 3x6
Core + hip stability
planned.notes: Strength is maintenance only now. Keep the nervous system sharp, don't build fatigue.

planned.desc:
Zwift race — short format
Pick a 20-30min race
Go HARD. Practice race mentality.
planned.notes: Racing is a skill. Practice it on the bike.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 6km
PM: Yoga 25min

Long run 18km
km 1-12 @ 5:00
km 13-16 @ 4:30-4:40
km 17-18 @ 4:15-4:20
Fast finish — feel the closing speed
planned.notes: Last big long run. Prove to yourself you can close hard.

planned.desc:
Long ride 2.5hrs
Outdoor — hilly route
Z2 base, attack the climbs

Easy run 7km + 6x strides
Stay sharp, stay fresh
planned.notes: No strength today. Fresh for track.

planned.desc:
TRACK — speed
WU: 2km + drills + 4x hill sprint (10sec max)
MAIN: 8x400m @ 78-80sec (3:15-3:20/km pace) (3:15-3:20/km)
(200m jog — keep it under 90sec)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Hill sprints wake up the fast-twitch before the 400s. Pure speed. Relax your face.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 6km
PM: Strength 30min — last session
Bodyweight explosive: bounds 3x6, plyo lunges 3x8
Core circuit 2 rounds
planned.notes: Last strength session of the cycle. Light and snappy.

planned.desc:
Zwift race — short crit format
20-30min race effort
Practice surges and closing
planned.notes: Last hard bike session. Race mentality. Attack the finish.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy run 6km
PM: Mobility 20min
planned.notes: Pre-long run. Reduced volume — taper starting.

planned.desc:
Long run 14km
All easy @ 5:00-5:10
No fast finish — just comfortable

Easy ride 90min Z2
Enjoy. Stay loose.
Easy run 6km + 4x strides
planned.notes: Taper week. Feel sharp, not tired.

planned.desc:
TRACK — final sharpener
WU: 2km + drills + 4x hill sprint (10sec — SNAP)
MAIN: 4x200m @ 36-38sec (3:00-3:10/km pace)
(200m walk recovery)
+ 2x400m @ 78sec (3:15/km pace)
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Hill sprints one last time to light up the neuromuscular system. Then SHORT and SHARP. Leave speed in the legs, not fatigue.

planned.desc:
Easy run 5km
Just move. Stay loose.

Easy spin 45min Z1
Short. Pre-race.
planned.notes: Last session before race. Stay off your feet.

planned.desc:
Pre-race shakeout
3km easy + 4x100m strides
+ 2x200m at 5K pace (3:28)
planned.notes: Touch race pace. That's it. Sleep early. Prep gear.

planned.desc:
A-RACE: 5K
WU: 2km easy + 4x100m strides + 2x200m

RACE PLAN:
km 1: 3:30 (DON'T go 3:20)
km 2: 3:28
km 3: 3:28
km 4: 3:28
km 5: 3:25 or whatever you have left

Target: 17:15-17:30
CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: THIS IS YOUR DAY. Even splits. Don't panic if km 1 is 3:32 — that's fine. Stay patient. Attack km 4-5.

planned.desc:
REST
Celebrate.
Rate the race 1-10.
What's next?
planned.notes: Speed 2 done. If sub-17:30: we shift to 10K block. If not: we adjust and try again.
